summary: This is an extremely brief link post where Joel Spolsky shares a link to Michael's new weblog about technical interview questions. There is no substantive argument or analysis — it is simply a pointer to another resource. The entire post is only 9 words plus a hyperlink.
key_points: Joel signals interest in the topic of technical interviewing, which would become a major theme of his later writing
The post reflects the early blogging era's convention of short link-sharing posts
key_insight: This micro-post is a simple link share with no substantive content to analyze.
